dialog.title: Dialog Box UI Component | Seamless Web Interaction Modal
dialog.description: Elevate your user experience with our Dialog UI component – an accessible modal dialog perfect for confirmations, notifications, and form entry on modern web and mobile sites. Improve engagement and conversion with our SEO-friendly open and close dialog design.

tooltip.title: Tooltip UI | Instant Context Popups for Better UX
tooltip.description: Enhance website usability with Tooltip UI components – provide instant info, hints, and contextual guidance to users. SEO-optimized tooltips improve accessibility and help users navigate with ease.

popover.title: SEO-Optimized Popover UI | Interactive Web Elements
popover.description: Deploy interactive Popover UI elements for layered content, product info, or user guidance. Popovers boost engagement, reduce bounce rates, and keep users informed – essential for SEO-driven websites.

login-dialog.title: Secure Login Dialog Component | User Authentication Modal
login-dialog.description: Log in securely and swiftly! Our SEO-focused Login Dialog offers a clean, accessible authentication modal with fields for email, password, signup, and quick recovery options. Boosts user trust and conversion for your brand.
login-dialog.name: Your Full Name
